case_title: UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA VS. BRENT F WOODS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-31-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
